overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from The Witcher 3: Blood and Wine showing Geralt of Rivia riding his horse through the vibrant Mediterranean-inspired countryside of Toussaint. The journey begins at a stone archway, ascends through ancient ruins toward a colossal statue, descends to a lakeside path, and ends in a small rural village.

events.description: passing through the large stone archway into the open meadow
beginning gentle ascent toward the stone stairway visible in the distance

agents.ego_description: Geralt riding his horse at a steady canter through the lush countryside, approaching and passing through a stone archway

entered.detail: large weathered stone archway marking the entrance to the meadow
tall slender cypress trees lining the meadow path
ancient stone wall ruins partially covered in vegetation
blue mountain range visible on the horizon
ancient stone stairway ascending the distant hill

segments.scene_description: The segment begins with Geralt on horseback approaching a large stone archway in a sunlit meadow filled with wildflowers. After passing through the archway around the 3-second mark, the camera continues forward through lush grass and cypress trees toward a distant stone stairway.

scene_state.functional_zone: ancient stone stairway ascending to monument

events.description: transitioning from open meadow to enclosed stone stairway flanked by pillars
reaching the top of the stairs and approaching the giant statue platform

agents.ego_description: Geralt riding up the ancient stone stairs, navigating the horse up the steps toward the colossal statue

entered.detail: tall stone columns flanking both sides of the stairway
colossal stone statue of a robed figure standing atop the hill
flat stone platform at the base of the giant statue

segments.scene_description: The scene transitions to an ancient stone stairway flanked by pillars as Geralt ascends toward a colossal statue visible against the bright sky. The path climbs steadily upward through historic ruins, reaching the monument platform by the end of the segment.

scene_state.functional_zone: hilltop monument overlooking lake and valley

events.description: beginning descent from the statue hill toward the lake visible in the valley
transitioning from monument plaza to winding lakeside path

agents.ego_description: Geralt circling the massive statue on horseback and beginning the descent down the hill toward the lake

entered.detail: serene blue lake visible in the valley below surrounded by forest
flock of birds flying across the sky

segments.scene_description: Geralt circles the massive stone statue atop the hill, revealing a panoramic view of a distant lake and mountain range. The descent begins down a winding dirt path, with the statue gradually moving to the right periphery as the lake comes into clearer view.

scene_state.functional_zone: rocky lakeside path with wooden bridge

events.description: passing under the wooden bridge structure creating brief shadow
exiting the rocky gorge and approaching the rural village

agents.ego_description: Geralt riding along the lakeside path, passing through a narrow rocky gorge and under a wooden bridge

entered.detail: rustic wooden bridge spanning the rocky gorge overhead
steep rocky walls and boulders lining the narrow path
wooden buildings and houses of the rural village in the distance

segments.scene_description: The path continues along the lakeside through a narrow rocky gorge, passing under a wooden bridge structure around 46 seconds. The terrain is rugged with stone walls closing in on both sides before opening up to reveal the approaching village in the distance.

scene_state.functional_zone: rural village center with wooden structures

events.description: entering the village from the wilderness path with buildings becoming prominent
slowing to a complete stop in the village center near other villagers

agents.ego_description: Geralt riding into the village, passing villagers and wooden structures, then bringing the horse to a stop

notable_agents.action: villager standing near a wooden cart, watching the rider approach
dog walking along the village road

entered.detail: rustic wooden village houses with shingled roofs
distinctive tall twisted stone spire rising behind the village
wooden carts and wagons parked along the village road

segments.scene_description: Geralt rides into a rural village with wooden houses and scattered villagers, passing by a distinctive twisted rock formation on the left. The horse slows and comes to a stop near other villagers and wooden carts in the village center.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous journey from a sunlit wildflower meadow, ascending through ancient ruins before descending toward a lakeside village. It begins with Geralt on horseback passing through a large stone archway and moving through lush grass and cypress trees toward a distant stairway. As the camera climbs the stone stairs flanked by pillars, the scene opens up to a colossal statue atop a hill, where the view expands to reveal a panoramic vista of a distant lake and mountain range. The perspective then shifts downward along a winding dirt path and through a narrow rocky gorge under a wooden bridge, with the rugged stone walls gradually giving way to an open landscape. Finally, the path leads into a rural village of wooden houses and twisted rock formations, where the horse slows to a stop amidst villagers and wooden carts.
